query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as projects_needing_contacts
FROM projects p
WHERE p.lifecycleStatus = 'active'
AND (
  SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contacts c 
  WHERE c.project = p.name 
  AND c.roleRelevance IN ('high', 'medium')
) < 2;
